hero.subtitle: Describe your post, pick your platform, and get a full set of optimized hashtags in 3 seconds. No guessing. No banned tags. No wasted reach.
hero.intro: Hashtagger is an AI-powered hashtag generator built for creators on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and X/Twitter. Every result is automatically filtered to remove banned and overused hashtags — the kind that quietly kill your content's visibility. Whether you're a solo creator or managing multiple accounts, Hashtagger helps you show up in the right feeds, every time.
hero.3SecondGenerationDesc: Type your post idea and get a full, ready-to-use hashtag set in under 3 seconds — no manual research, no tab switching.
hero.bannedTagFilterDesc: Hashtagger automatically removes banned and restricted hashtags before you ever see them. Protect your reach without lifting a finger.
hero.multiPlatformDesc: Built for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and X/Twitter. Each result is optimized for that platform's algorithm — not a one-size-fits-all list.
hero.competitionAnalysisDesc: See how competitive each hashtag is before you use it. Find the sweet spot between reach and discoverability — a Pro-only feature.

home.selectPlatform: Select your platform and describe your post
home.unlimitedGenerations: Unlimited generations, image analysis, competition insights, and more
home.faq1A: Yes. The free plan gives you 10 hashtag generations per day — no credit card required. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited generations and advanced features like competition analysis and image analysis.
home.faq2A: Hashtagger generates optimized hashtags for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and X/Twitter. Each platform gets its own tailored output based on how that platform's algorithm works.
home.faq3Q: Why do I need to filter banned hashtags?
home.faq3A: Using a banned hashtag — even by accident — can suppress your content's reach without any warning from the platform. Hashtagger filters these out automatically so your posts stay visible.
home.faq4Q: How is Hashtagger different from free hashtag tools?
home.faq4A: Free tools give you generic lists. Hashtagger uses AI to generate hashtags based on your specific post description, filters banned tags, and on Pro, shows you competition data so you can pick hashtags that actually help you grow.

hashtagInput.placeholder: Describe your post... e.g., 'Just finished a tough workout at the gym, feeling accomplished!'

hashtagResults.competitionAnalysis: Competition analysis & banned tag filtering are Pro features
hashtagResults.highDesc: Very popular tags with millions of posts. Hard to get noticed unless you have a large following. Best for established accounts.
hashtagResults.mediumDesc: Good balance of reach and competition. Ideal for growing accounts. Mix with some low competition tags.
hashtagResults.lowDesc: Easier to rank for. Great for new accounts or niche content. Use these to build initial engagement.
hashtagResults.proTip: Pro tip: Mix high, medium, and low competition tags (about 2-3 of each) for best results across all platforms.

mediaUpload.noHashtags: No hashtags generated. Try a clearer image.
mediaUpload.videoAnalysisFailed: Could not extract frames from video. Please try a different file.
mediaUpload.videoLoadFailed: Could not load video. Please use a direct video file URL (MP4, WebM) that is publicly accessible. Streaming links (YouTube, TikTok embeds) are not supported.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start free, upgrade when you need more power.
pricing.faq1Q: How does the daily limit work?
pricing.faq1A: Free users get 10 generations per day, reset at midnight UTC. Pro and Business users have unlimited generations.
pricing.faq2A: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq3Q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq3A: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal through our secure payment provider Lemon Squeezy.
pricing.faq4A: Pro users can start with a 5-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a full refund.
